creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
X doesn't start on a Dell Latitude D630 laptop having 4 Gb of memory and a NVidia Quadro card when using the "nv" video driver. I'm running 7.2-STABLE. The same hardware configuration works perfectly if 2 Gb are removed from the laptop or if it boots on Mandriva Linux 2009.1 i686 (but it uses the NVidia proprietary driver).
